summary: Iteration 22 - Game Question Structure Refinement (P0). All 13 features tested and verified. Backend: 5/5 API tests passed. Frontend: Tricky Testament self-scoring UI works correctly (Reveal Answer → Got it!/Missed it! buttons), Trivia Mix-Up has MCQ options. Admin gets full 5x5 board, demo users get 5x2 board.
critical_code_review_comments: trivia_game.py Lines 717-739: game_type filtering correctly implemented. trivia_testament strips options (Jeopardy recall-based), tricky_trivia ensures MCQ options exist.
TrickyTestamentGame.js: Self-scoring UI correctly implemented with data-testid attributes: reveal-answer-btn, got-it-btn, missed-it-btn, self-score-buttons, revealed-answer, question-prompt.
TrickyTestamentGame.js: NO MCQ answer buttons in question view - only prompt text and Reveal Answer button (correct for Jeopardy).
TrickyTestamentGame.js: Scoring logic works - Got it! adds points, Missed it! does not (or deducts for Daily Double).
TrickyTestamentGame.js: Board state updates correctly - tile marked with ✓ after answering, counter increments.
MixUpGame.js: MCQ options correctly displayed with A., B., C., D. prefixes. 4 lifelines available.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing trivia_questions collection (383 questions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Game question structure fully tested. Key findings: (1) trivia_testament (Jeopardy) returns questions WITHOUT options field - backend strips them at line 725. (2) tricky_trivia (Millionaire) returns questions WITH options - backend generates distractors if missing at lines 733-738. (3) Self-scoring UI uses data-testid: reveal-answer-btn, got-it-btn, missed-it-btn. (4) Demo users see 5x2 board (10 tiles), admin/instructor see 5x5 board (25 tiles).

backend_demo_access_limited.details: Unauthenticated users get max 10 questions, access_level=demo

backend_admin_full_access.details: Admin users get full question pool, access_level=full, unlocked_series=[holiday_4c, breakfast, shared]

tricky_testament_jeopardy_board.details: Jeopardy board loads with 5x2 demo grid (10 tiles) or 5x5 full grid (25 tiles)

tricky_testament_no_mcq_buttons.details: Question view shows ONLY prompt text - NO multiple choice answer buttons

tricky_testament_got_it_btn.details: 'Got it!' button appears after reveal with point value (data-testid='got-it-btn')

tricky_testament_scoring_works.details: Got it! adds 100 points, score updates from 0 to 100 Stacks

tricky_testament_board_state_updates.details: Tile marked with ✓ after answering, counter shows '1/10 Answered'

trivia_mixup_mcq_options.details: 4 MCQ answer options displayed (A. Daughter, B. Son, C. Temple, D. Miracle)

admin_full_board_access.details: Admin user sees 'Full Board' badge and 25 tiles (5x5 grid with 100-500 point values)
